utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides physical_health (€200/month), mental_health (€130/month), plus family_coverage and a total_health_cost (€460/month). Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides home_insurance (€95/month) and covered_assets details, plus total_property_cost (€95/month). Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides travel_insurance (€110/month), benefits, and total_travel_cost (€110/month). Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists business_coverage (€35/month) and premium_membership (€20/month) with total_additional_cost (€55/month). Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan lists monthly_cost, annual_cost, previous costs, savings, and percentage. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item named in the final coverage plan to the exact corresponding option in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: PrimeCare Premium Physical (maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> PrimeCare Premium Plan), PrimeCare Premium Mental (maps to primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> PrimeCare Premium Plan), Family Coverage Addition is not in ground-truth list (no rating provided, so we exclude it), EliteHome Premium Coverage (maps to property_protection.home_content -> EliteHome Premium Coverage), EliteTravel Premium Plan (maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> EliteTravel Premium Plan), Home Office Protection (maps to property_enhancement_services -> Home Office Protection), Premium Insurance Membership (maps to general_services -> Premium Insurance Membership). We only include items that have exact matches in the ratings data.
